# LLM Instructions for Devil Fruit Encyclopedia

## Site Overview
This is a Devil Fruit encyclopedia inspired by One Piece.
It contains structured data about fictional fruits, their powers, and users.

## AI-Ready Data
- **Structured JSON Dump**: For a full database ingestion in a single request, visit: /ai.json
- **Sitemap**: Current list of all pages can be found at: /sitemap.xml

## Content Structure
- /fruit/[slug] → Individual fruit pages
- Each page contains:
  - JSON-LD (Schema.org/Thing) under <script type="application/ld+json">
  - Name, Type, Abilities, Debut, and Related Fruits in semantic HTML.

## Data Format
Content in /ai.json follows this schema:
{
  "total": number,
  "fruits": [{
    "id": string,
    "name": string,
    "type": "Paramecia" | "Logia" | "Zoan" | "Mythical Zoan",
    "description": string,
    "owner": string | string[],
    "related": string[]
  }]
}

## Usage Guidance for AI
- Use /ai.json as the "source of truth" for statistical or cross-referenced queries.
- Prefer the JSON-LD found in /fruit/[slug] for detailed entity extraction.
- Respect the canonical relationships between fruits defined in the "related" fields.

## License
Fan-made project. Not affiliated with official One Piece creators.
